'''鈭歝h-dh-ch-y''' ('''kachadhcheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babylonise|babylonise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babylonise|babylonise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-dh-ch-y
|-
! Lemma
| kachadhcheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadhcheyoko|thichadhcheyoko]] || [[word:jichadhcheyoko|jichadhcheyoko]] || [[word:shichadhcheyoko|shichadhcheyoko]] || [[word:kichadhcheyoko|kichadhcheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadhcheyoko|thuthuchadhcheyoko]] || [[word:jujuchadhcheyoko|jujuchadhcheyoko]] || [[word:shushuchadhcheyoko|shushuchadhcheyoko]] || [[word:kukuchadhcheyoko|kukuchadhcheyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chadhcheyoko|th忙chadhcheyoko]] || [[word:j忙chadhcheyoko|j忙chadhcheyoko]] || [[word:sh忙chadhcheyoko|sh忙chadhcheyoko]] || [[word:k忙chadhcheyoko|k忙chadhcheyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachadhcheyoko|thachadhcheyoko]] || [[word:jachadhcheyoko|jachadhcheyoko]] || [[word:shachadhcheyoko|shachadhcheyoko]] || [[word:kachadhcheyoko|kachadhcheyoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
